title: [P0][RT2] Node/V8 Zone OOM root-cause remains open for large linked artifacts, but `run_wasm.js` now auto-reexecs large modules with `--liftoff-only --no-wasm-tier-up --no-wasm-dynamic-tiering --wasm-num-compilation-tasks=1` (opt-out: `MOLT_WASM_AUTO_NODE_FLAGS=0`) so default runs avoid crash-on-start
